title: Add version module to diagnostics crate
purpose: The diagnostics crate needs to expose its version at runtime so that error messages and debug output can include the build version. This is a foundational piece — once the pattern is established here, other crates can adopt it. The version must be derived from Cargo.toml, not hardcoded, so it stays in sync across releases without manual intervention.
task: Create a version module in the diagnostics crate that exports a VERSION constant and a version_info() function. The constant uses env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION") to pull the version from Cargo.toml at compile time. The version_info() function formats a string like "diagnostics v0.1.0" for use in error messages and debug output. Wire the module into lib.rs with a pub mod declaration and re-export VERSION at the crate root. Checks are run automatically after implementation — do not run cargo commands yourself.

requirements.title: Create version.rs with VERSION constant and version_info function
requirements.spec: WHEN the diagnostics crate is compiled THE SYSTEM SHALL export a VERSION constant containing the crate version from Cargo.toml AND it SHALL provide a version_info() function that returns a formatted string including the crate name and version AND it SHALL NOT hardcode the version string.
acceptance: crates/diagnostics/src/version.rs exists and contains a pub const VERSION
VERSION is assigned via env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION"), not a hardcoded string literal
version_info() function returns a formatted string containing the crate name and version
No hardcoded version strings anywhere in version.rs — only env! macro

requirements.title: Wire version module into lib.rs
requirements.spec: WHEN any consumer imports the diagnostics crate THE SYSTEM SHALL make VERSION available at the crate root via pub use AND it SHALL NOT break any existing public API.
acceptance: pub mod version declaration present in lib.rs
pub use version::VERSION re-export present in lib.rs
No existing pub declarations removed or modified in lib.rs

boundaries: SHALL NOT add any new dependencies to diagnostics/Cargo.toml
SHALL NOT modify any existing files except lib.rs
SHALL NOT change any existing public API
verification: version.rs contains env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION") not a hardcoded string
lib.rs contains pub mod version and pub use version::VERSION
grep -r confirms no existing public API removed from lib.rs
